title: LAAG HOME
description: Next-Gen Home-GUI Solutions - Highly Optimized, Feature-Complete
body:
![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/186e5c4c5d6124aebbd5a413007a9634a4f7b78f.png)

# LagHome – Ultimate Home GUI Plugin

**LagHome** is a sleek, easy-to-use home management plugin powered by an interactive GUI system. Built for Paper/Spigot servers, it's ideal for Survival, Lifesteal, and Factions.

---

## ✦ Features

### ▸ GUI-Based Home System

Players can manage homes using a simple menu — no need to memorize commands.

### ▸ Permission-Based Home Limits

Use `lagohome.amount.X` to control how many homes each rank can have.

### ▸ Progressive Home Unlocking

Enforce sequential unlocking: players must set Home 1 before Home 2, and so on.

### ▸ Confirm Deletion

Accidental home removals? Not anymore — players must confirm via GUI.

### ▸ Home Info Display

Easily view home usage (e.g. `Homes: 2/5`) and info directly from the menu.

### ▸ Customizable Config

* All messages & prefixes editable
* YAML format with color code support (`&a`, `&b`, etc.)

---

## 🔧 Setup & Compatibility

* Supports Minecraft **1.16 → 1.21+**
* Works on Paper and Spigot
* Drag and drop installation

---

## 📦 Commands

```
/sethome [name]
/delhome [name]
```

---

## 🔌 Perfect For

* Lifesteal Servers
* Survival SMPs
* Factions
* Minigames

---

## 📢 Feedback & Support

Have suggestions or found a bug? Feel free to reach out on our support page or Discord!
